'''Zuur''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Falleen/Legends|Falleen]] employed on [[Void Station]] by [[Jib Kopatha]].

==Biography==
Six months after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Zuur, along with [[Xora]], was one of a number of Kopatha's Falleen employees to try and [[Death/Legends|kill]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] in revenge for his sterilization of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Falleen (planet)/Legends|Falleen]]. Zuur and the rest of the conspirators were killed by Vader.

==Appearances==
*[[Empire 19|''Empire'' 19]] {{1st}}
